channel.title: cytokinin response on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in cytokinin response on funPlantGenes

item.title: ZmARF29
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb433020 Gene Symbol: ZmARF29 Gene Name: ARF-transcription factor 29 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmCKX10
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb040280 Gene Symbol: ZmCKX10 Gene Name: cytokinin oxidase10 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmCKX4a
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb151670 Gene Symbol: ZmCKX4a|ZmCKO4 Gene Name: cytokinin oxidase 4 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmNLP3.1;nlp4
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G375675 Gene Symbol: ZmNLP3.1 nlp4 Gene Name: NLP-transcription factor 4 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Loss of function of ZmNRT1.

item.title: ZmRR4;gpm84
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb362820 Gene Symbol: ZmRR4 gpm84 crr4 Gene Name: cytokinin response regulator4 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmWUS1-B
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmWUS1-B Gene Name: WUS1 protein Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: ZmWUS1-B is controlled by a spontaneously generated novel promoter region that dramatically increases its expression and alters patterning and development of young ears.
